  have h‚āĀ : A = ‚ąÖ := by simp_all [Set.isEmpty_iff_eq_empty]
  rw [h‚āĀ]
  have h‚āā : image f ‚ąÖ = ‚ąÖ := by
    -- Prove that the image of the empty set under any function is the empty set.
    ext x
    simp [Set.mem_image]
  have h‚āÉ : (‚ąÖ : Set ‚Ąē) = I 0 := by
    -- Prove that the empty set is equal to the interval I 0 (which is empty).
    simp [I]

  rw [h‚āā, h‚āÉ]

by
  have h1 : A = (‚ąÖ : Set U) := by
    have h2 : A = ‚ąÖ := by
      -- Use the fact that `empty A` means `A` has no elements to conclude `A = ‚ąÖ`
      have h3 : ‚ąÄ (x : U), x ‚ąČ A := by
        intro x hx
        -- If there were an element `x` in `A`, it would contradict `empty A`
        have h4 : nonempty A := ‚ü®x, hx‚ü©
        exact h.ne_empty h4
      -- Since no element is in `A`, `A` must be empty
      apply Set.eq_empty_of_forall_not_mem
      exact h3
    -- The result follows directly from the previous step
    exact h2
  
  have h2 : image f A = (‚ąÖ : Set ‚Ąē) := by
    rw [h1]
    simp [image]
    <;>
    aesop
  
  have h3 : (‚ąÖ : Set ‚Ąē) = I 0 := by
    ext n
    simp [I]
    <;>
    omega
  
  have h4 : image f A = I 0 := by
    rw [h2]
    rw [h3]
  
  exact h4

by
  ext x
  have h‚āĀ : x ‚ąą image f A ‚ÜĒ False := by
    constructor
    ¬∑ intro h‚āā
      -- If x is in the image of A under f, then there exists some y in A such that f(y) = x.
      -- But A is empty, so this is impossible.
      simp_all [Set.nonempty_iff_ne_empty, Set.empty_iff, image_eq_empty]
      <;> aesop
    ¬∑ intro h‚āā
      -- If False is true, then anything follows.
      simp_all
  have h‚āā : x ‚ąą I 0 ‚ÜĒ False := by
    simp [I]
  -- Combining the above two statements, we get that x is in the image of A under f if and only if it is in the empty set.
  simp_all

‚Ąē) (h : empty A) : image f A = I 0 := sorry

theorem image_empty {U : Type} {A : Set U}
    (f : U ‚Üí ‚Ąē) (h : empty A) : image f A = I 0 := by
  have h‚āĀ : A = ‚ąÖ := by
    rw [Set.ext_iff] at h ‚äĘ
    intro a
    have h‚āā := h a
    simp_all [Set.mem_empty_iff_false]
    <;> tauto
  
  rw [h‚āĀ]
  simp [image_empty]
  <;>
  decide
  <;>
  aesop

by
  have h‚āĀ : A = ‚ąÖ := by simpa [Set.ext_iff] using h
  rw [h‚āĀ]
  simp [image_empty]
  <;>
  simp_all [Set.ext_iff, image]
  <;>
  aesop
